name: SYS · User Retention (MoM)
sql:
WITH initial_users AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT jsonb_extract_path_text(value::jsonb, 'username') AS username
    FROM events
    WHERE type = 'USER_LOGIN'
    AND date_created >= '2024-05-01'  -- Replace with your desired start date
    AND date_created < '2024-05-31'    -- Replace with your desired end date
),
returning_users AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT jsonb_extract_path_text(value::jsonb, 'username') AS username
    FROM events
    WHERE type = 'USER_LOGIN'
    AND date_created >= '2024-06-01'  -- Replace with your desired start date for the subsequent period
    AND date_created < '2024-06-30'   -- Replace with your desired end date for the subsequent period
)
SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT i.username) AS initial_users,
    COUNT(DISTINCT r.username) AS returning_users,
    COUNT(DISTINCT r.username) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT i.username), 0) AS retention_rate
FROM initial_users i
LEFT JOIN returning_users r ON i.username = r.username
